positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial and botanical motif. The central design features interlocking, geometrically simplified cosmic elements (moons, stars, constellations) interwoven with lush, abstract tropical flora (palm fronds, monstera leaves). The style is a blend of art deco and minimalist psychedelia, rendered with strong, clean silhouettes and thick, defining outlines. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep indigo, burnished gold, muted jade green, and creamy off-white. The composition must be central and perfectly balanced, designed to look exceptional on a garment print. Clean vectors, graphic novel quality, dot art texture application, flat graphic design, high contrast, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, maximal detail.
negative: blurry, grainy, noise, text, watermark, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, human figure, photorealism, smoke, messy, gradient, muted color
